case_title: PATRICIA MONTES LOPEZ VS. ALEMAN ELSY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, PATRICIA MONTES AS TO DEFENDANT ELSY, ALEMAN DBA  TRANSPORTES SALVADORENO SUCHITLAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
